[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000101000 2
1 0010000001 2
2 1000101001 4
3 0010000000 1
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 0000000000 a match 4 5 6 7

56 0011010010 4

70 0100001000 2
